name: The Blazing Mars
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｔｈｅ ｂｌａｚｉｎｇ ＭＡＲＳ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ザ・ブレイジング・マーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: While this card is in your hand or GY: You can banish 3 other monsters from your GY; Special Summon this card, also you cannot Special Summon other monsters for the rest of this turn. During your Main Phase 1: You can send all other monsters you control to the GY; inflict 500 damage to your opponent for each monster sent to the GY. You can only use this effect of "The Blazing Mars" once per turn.
mnst_eff: While this card is in your hand or GY: You can banish 3 other monsters from your GY; Special Summon this card, also you cannot Special Summon other monsters for the rest of this turn. During your Main Phase 1: You can send all other monsters you control to the GY; inflict 500 damage to your opponent for each monster sent to the GY. You can only use this effect of "The Blazing Mars" once per turn.

action: Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
